assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Response clearly states '24-month support lifecycle (vs 14 months on Regular)' and includes a comparison table showing support periods

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions 'Additional cost during extended support period (months 15-24)' and includes a dedicated cost planning section

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: While the response mentions 'same promotion timeline as Regular for new versions', it doesn't clearly explain that Extended gets the same versions but keeps them available longer

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Delayed access to new Kubernetes features' as a limitation of Extended channel

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Response includes the exact command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --zone YOUR_ZONE --release-channel extended'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Response includes a verification step with the command to check if 1.31 is available in Extended channel and includes it in the pre-migration checklist

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: Response states 'Ideal for compliance environments that need predictable, infrequent major changes' and recommends it for production stability

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: Response includes monitoring for End of Extended Support timestamps and mentions the 24-month limit with cost implications during extended period

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'No auto-minor upgrades except at end of extended support' and includes detailed manual minor upgrade process with specific commands
